---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the problem you're running into, or the use case this would enable.

**What would you like to see?**
Describe the feature. Be specific — include API shapes, config options, or behavior changes if relevant.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Anything else you tried or thought about.

**Are you willing to implement it?**
Yes / No / Maybe — just helps us understand the priority.
